F

filterChain(HttpSecurity) - Method in class com.example.shortesttmpath.config.SecurityConfig
Requires an API key to make requests.

G

getAllLines() - Method in class com.example.shortesttmpath.controller.LinesController
Returns the name of each metro line.
getAllStations(String) - Method in class com.example.shortesttmpath.controller.LinesController
Returns all the stations for a metro line.
getAllStations(String) - Static method in class com.example.shortesttmpath.util.ShortestPathUtil
Returns all the stations for a metro line.
getAllStationsInAlphabeticalOrder() - Method in class com.example.shortesttmpath.controller.StationsController
Returns all the stations in alphabetical order.
getAllStationsInAlphabeticalOrder() - Static method in class com.example.shortesttmpath.util.ShortestPathUtil
Returns all the stations in alphabetical order.
getShortestPath(String, String) - Method in class com.example.shortesttmpath.controller.ShortestPathController
Returns the shortest metro path (the one with the least stations) between two STM metro stations.
getShortestPath(String, String) - Static method in class com.example.shortesttmpath.util.ShortestPathUtil
Returns the shortest metro path (the one with the least stations) between two STM metro stations.
GREEN - Enum constant in enum class com.example.shortesttmpath.enums.Line
The green line.

H

handle() - Method in class com.example.shortesttmpath.controller.LinesController
Returns a 400 bad request with an error message if the InvalidLineException exception was thrown meaning that the provided metro line is invalid.
handle() - Method in class com.example.shortesttmpath.controller.ShortestPathController
Returns a 400 bad request with an error message if the StationsOnSameLineException exception was thrown meaning that the two provided stations were on the same line.

I

InvalidLineException - Exception Class in com.example.shortesttmpath.exception
Is thrown when the provided metro line is invalid.
InvalidLineException() - Constructor for exception class com.example.shortesttmpath.exception.InvalidLineException
Standard RuntimeException constructor with a custom message.

L

Line - Enum Class in com.example.shortesttmpath.enums
Represents a metro line.
LinesController - Class in com.example.shortesttmpath.controller
The controller related to lines.
LinesController() - Constructor for class com.example.shortesttmpath.controller.LinesController
The default constructor.

S

SecurityConfig - Class in com.example.shortesttmpath.config
The security configuration.
SecurityConfig() - Constructor for class com.example.shortesttmpath.config.SecurityConfig
Default constructor.
ShortestPathBean - Class in com.example.shortesttmpath.data
Represents the shortest metro path (the one with the least stations) between two STM metro stations.
ShortestPathBean() - Constructor for class com.example.shortesttmpath.data.ShortestPathBean
The default constructor.
ShortestPathController - Class in com.example.shortesttmpath.controller
The controller related with providing the shortest metro path (the one with the least stations) between two STM metro stations.
ShortestPathController() - Constructor for class com.example.shortesttmpath.controller.ShortestPathController
The default constructor.
ShortestPathUtil - Class in com.example.shortesttmpath.util
Util class to calculate the shortest metro path (the one with the least stations) between two STM metro stations.
ShortestPathUtil() - Constructor for class com.example.shortesttmpath.util.ShortestPathUtil
The default constructor.
ShortesttmPathApplication - Class in com.example.shortesttmpath
The main class of the Spring Boot application.
ShortesttmPathApplication() - Constructor for class com.example.shortesttmpath.ShortesttmPathApplication
The default constructor.
StationsController - Class in com.example.shortesttmpath.controller
The controller related to stations.
StationsController() - Constructor for class com.example.shortesttmpath.controller.StationsController
The default constructor.
StationsOnSameLineException - Exception Class in com.example.shortesttmpath.exception
Is thrown when the two stations are on the same line.
StationsOnSameLineException() - Constructor for exception class com.example.shortesttmpath.exception.StationsOnSameLineException
Standard RuntimeException constructor with a custom message.
